000-entrance.title: The Entrance
000-entrance.description: A crooked wooden door stands at the mouth of the dungeon, held shut by a single rusty nail and sheer optimism. A sign nailed above it reads: "Built by whoever showed up. Enter at your own risk."

items.name: Suspicious Biscuit
items.description: Smells faintly of danger. Might restore 1 HP. Might not.

000-entrance.easter_egg: Knock on the door three times and it politely knocks back.
000-entrance.author: dexter-ifti

001-goblin-tea-party.title: The Goblin Tea Party
001-goblin-tea-party.description: Three goblins sit around a comically small table, teacups trembling in their claws. They freeze mid-sip and stare at you like you've interrupted something extremely important.

items.name: Chipped Teacup
items.description: Empty. You get the feeling it was never really about the tea.

001-goblin-tea-party.easter_egg: Say "sugar" three times and one goblin offers you a biscuit.
001-goblin-tea-party.author: dexter-ifti

002-mirror-maze.title: The Hall of Infinite Reflections
002-mirror-maze.description: Your reflection steps before you, mimicking your every move — except its grin is just a bit too wide. Mirrors stretch in every direction, some cracked, some fogged, some showing rooms that definitely aren't behind them.

items.name: Handheld Mirror
items.description: Shows you what's behind you. Also winks at you when you're not looking.

monster.name: Reflected Doppelganger
monster.greeting: You look tired. Mind if I borrow your face?

002-mirror-maze.easter_egg: Say "I know you're not real" and the doppelganger sulks into a mirror, disappearing.
002-mirror-maze.author: dhruvxbug

003-mighty-dragon.title: The Mighty Dragon challenges you for a battle!.
003-mighty-dragon.description: The air is thick with smoke and unbearable heat. Massive claw marks scar the stone floor, and mountains of gold surround an ancient beast.

items.name: Dragonbane
items.description: A legendary blade forged from celestial steel and tempered in the heart of a dying star.

monster.name: Ignaroth, the Flame Tyrant
monster.greeting: "I can hear your heartbeat from across the cavern. It trembles with fear. Kneel now, and I may grant you a swift end."

003-mighty-dragon.author: lucifer

004-succubus-den.title: The Succubus Den
004-succubus-den.description: Crimson candles flicker along walls draped in suspiciously expensive velvet. A figure lounges on a black throne, smiling like she already knows why you came here. The door behind you quietly locks itself. Awkward.

monster.name: The Velvet Succubus
monster.greeting: Oh? Another adventurer who thinks they have good decision-making skills?

items.name: Suspiciously Warm Rose
items.description: It smells wonderful. Your survival instincts strongly recommend putting it back exactly where you found it.

004-succubus-den.easter_egg: Say "I have a girlfriend" and the entire room goes silent for five uncomfortable seconds.
004-succubus-den.author: Anonymous

005-cosmic-observatory.title: The Observatory Beyond the Ceiling
005-cosmic-observatory.description: The dungeon simply... ends. Where cold stone should seal the chamber, an endless universe stretches overhead, alive with drifting nebulae, impossible constellations, and galaxies that move ever so slightly when you're not looking directly at them. An ancient brass telescope slowly turns on its own, tracking your every step without making a sound. Resting beneath it is a weathered bronze plaque engraved with the words: "Built by Adarsh, who believed every mystery begins with looking up."

items.name: Celestial Atlas
items.description: A beautifully illustrated atlas whose constellations rearrange themselves each time you open it. One unnamed star pulses softly, as if waiting for someone to discover it.

monster.name: The Celestial Watcher
monster.greeting: For centuries I have watched adventurers seek gold, glory, and power. You are the first to pause and admire the stars. Perhaps your journey will end differently.

005-cosmic-observatory.easter_egg: Type "look through telescope" to glimpse a constellation that perfectly mirrors the dungeon below.
005-cosmic-observatory.author: adarsh-singh01

006-library-of-lies.title: The Library of Lies
006-library-of-lies.description: Shelves stretch into darkness, crammed with books whose titles actively insult you. "Honest Politicians: A Complete Collection" (all pages blank). "The Ocean is Dry" (just a picture of a desert). "101% Accurate Riddles." A single leather-bound book glows faintly on a pedestal at the center. A stone alcove shaped like an open book is set into the north wall.

items.name: Riddle Book
items.description: You open it. Inside, a single line: "I have words but never speak. What am I?" The rest is blank. On the last page, someone scrawled: "Place me in the alcove. The answer is also the key."

puzzle.description: A stone alcove shaped like an open book. An inscription reads: "Speak the answer with your hands."
puzzle.question: What has words but never speaks?
puzzle.success_msg: The alcove glows. The book sinks into the stone, and the wall grinds open, revealing a passage northward. (go north)

006-library-of-lies.easter_egg: Check the Riddle Book to read the riddle. Take it, then place it in the alcove to unlock the north exit.
006-library-of-lies.author: dhruvxbug

l1c1-01-stairwell.title: The Descent
l1c1-01-stairwell.description: A spiral stone staircase leads down into impenetrable darkness. The heat of the  dragon's lair fades, replaced by a damp, chilling draft from below.

puzzle.description: A heavy stone box blocks the stairs down. It has a slot perfectly shaped for a legendary blade.
puzzle.question: A voice echoes: 'I was forged from celestial steel and tempered in the heat of a Flame Dragon. Place me in the box to proceed.'
puzzle.success_msg: You place the Dragonbane in the box. The box clicks open, granting access to the depths below.

items.name: Dusty Torch
items.description: An old wooden torch. It still has some pitch left.
items.on_use: You light the torch. It burns brightly.

l1c1-01-stairwell.author: Yashwanth137

l1c1-02-dark-corridor.title: The Dark Corridor
l1c1-02-dark-corridor.description: The light from the entrance barely reaches this part of the dungeon. It smells like old parchment and regrets. The path abruptly ends at a solid stone wall.

puzzle.description: It is pitch black here. You cannot see any way forward.
puzzle.question: The darkness is absolute. Place a light source to illuminate the area.
puzzle.success_msg: You place the Dusty Torch on an empty wall sconce. The sudden light reveals a hidden trapdoor to the basement! But suddenly, a swarm of bats attacks your face and you fall down!

l1c1-02-dark-corridor.author: Yashwanth137
